THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALKER, ALTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDERS, ANGIE CHEATHAM $575.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.00, ALSO A JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR 50% INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY AT 424 WHITE CLIFF DRIVE, VALLEJO, NOT LATER THAN DECEMBER 31, 2006.
